name: Repo Name / Code lives in field is blank (re-run)
task:
On the sprint card, there are two placeholders for repo and code path. These are blank for the project.
If it's the case that we don't have a repo, please make one. If we do have one, ensure these get properly populated
plannerOutput: The project config already has a repo field, but sprint cards don't surface it and sprint contracts default to '.'. This requires fixing the data flow: ensuring sprint creation inherits the project repo, and that the board card UI shows it. It's primarily a backend/API data-plumbing fix with a minor frontend touch on the card component — best suited for a general-purpose dev.

constraints: Follow existing code patterns and conventions
